'''鈭歞-r-sh-y''' ('''kadarsheyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lube|lube]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-sh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lube|lube]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-r-sh-y
|-
! Lemma
| kadarsheyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidarsheyoko|thidarsheyoko]] || [[word:jidarsheyoko|jidarsheyoko]] || [[word:shidarsheyoko|shidarsheyoko]] || [[word:kidarsheyoko|kidarsheyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudarsheyoko|thuthudarsheyoko]] || [[word:jujudarsheyoko|jujudarsheyoko]] || [[word:shushudarsheyoko|shushudarsheyoko]] || [[word:kukudarsheyoko|kukudarsheyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudarsheyoko|thudarsheyoko]] || [[word:judarsheyoko|judarsheyoko]] || [[word:shudarsheyoko|shudarsheyoko]] || [[word:kudarsheyoko|kudarsheyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudarsheyoko|thudarsheyoko]] || [[word:judarsheyoko|judarsheyoko]] || [[word:shudarsheyoko|shudarsheyoko]] || [[word:kudarsheyoko|kudarsheyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedarsheyoko|thedarsheyoko]] || [[word:jedarsheyoko|jedarsheyoko]] || [[word:shedarsheyoko|shedarsheyoko]] || [[word:kedarsheyoko|kedarsheyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodarsheyoko|thothodarsheyoko]] || [[word:jojodarsheyoko|jojodarsheyoko]] || [[word:shoshodarsheyoko|shoshodarsheyoko]] || [[word:kokodarsheyoko|kokodarsheyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodarsheyoko|thodarsheyoko]] || [[word:jodarsheyoko|jodarsheyoko]] || [[word:shodarsheyoko|shodarsheyoko]] || [[word:kodarsheyoko|kodarsheyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodarsheyoko|thodarsheyoko]] || [[word:jodarsheyoko|jodarsheyoko]] || [[word:shodarsheyoko|shodarsheyoko]] || [[word:kodarsheyoko|kodarsheyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙darsheyoko|th忙darsheyoko]] || [[word:j忙darsheyoko|j忙darsheyoko]] || [[word:sh忙darsheyoko|sh忙darsheyoko]] || [[word:k忙darsheyoko|k忙darsheyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadarsheyoko|thathadarsheyoko]] || [[word:jajadarsheyoko|jajadarsheyoko]] || [[word:shashadarsheyoko|shashadarsheyoko]] || [[word:kakadarsheyoko|kakadarsheyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadarsheyoko|thadarsheyoko]] || [[word:jadarsheyoko|jadarsheyoko]] || [[word:shadarsheyoko|shadarsheyoko]] || [[word:kadarsheyoko|kadarsheyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadarsheyoko|thadarsheyoko]] || [[word:jadarsheyoko|jadarsheyoko]] || [[word:shadarsheyoko|shadarsheyoko]] || [[word:kadarsheyoko|kadarsheyoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadarsheyithi|shadarsheyithi]] || [[word:shadarsheyiji|shadarsheyiji]] || [[word:shadarsheyishi|shadarsheyishi]] || [[word:shadarsheyiki|shadarsheyiki]]
